summary: Iteration 3 verified end-to-end. Backend: all 15 pytest cases pass including new tag-preset CRUD, duplicate rejection, forgot-password without reset_link in body, token recovery from server logs, reset+relogin flow, and verified-recipient Resend email_sent=true. Frontend: Register→Onboard→Dashboard→Settings preset add/duplicate/remove→Done dialog reflects presets→Add/Undo→current task→History (export/edit-day dialog/tags-panel)→logout→login all pass.
action_items: MINOR: Add data-testid="shortcuts-dialog" to AlertDialogContent in /app/frontend/src/components/ShortcutsDialog.jsx so automation can positively assert the dialog opened via '?' shortcut. Functional behavior is fine; only test hook missing.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py at 806 lines — consider splitting into routers (auth, actions, tasks, presets) per file-size guideline (>700).
forgot_password: reset link is logged in application logs (INFO). This is fine for dev/testing but should be behind a DEBUG flag or removed for production to avoid leaking tokens in logs.
Resend send is awaited (via asyncio.to_thread) — endpoint latency is now tied to Resend response time. Consider truly fire-and-forget via BackgroundTasks so forgot-password stays instant.

Duplicate preset check relies on Python-level find_one plus unique index on (user_id,name). Good defense-in-depth, but the 400 message 'Preset already exists' is fine — no case-insensitivity though: 'Physics' and 'physics' would both be allowed. Consider normalizing name (e.g., strip+casefold on unique index) if desired.
test_credentials: Fresh users created per test run (ubc.fe.<ts>@example.com / TestPass123). Verified Resend recipient exam.preperation358@gmail.com exists in DB and returns email_sent=true.
seed_data_creation: Default tag presets (Physics, Chemistry, Math, Biology) auto-seeded on first GET /api/tag-presets — verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 acceptance test suite lives in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py — 15 tests covering iter1+2+3. Run with: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=<preview_url> pytest backend/tests/backend_test.py -o addopts='' -v. Reset token now recovered from supervisor logs (see _extract_reset_token_from_logs helper). Resend testing mode: only delivers to exam.preperation358@gmail.com; other addresses return 200 with email_sent=false which is expected behavior, not a bug.
